strengths: 16+ years of full-stack experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, and React production work at Optilyz and re:cinq — well above the 6-year minimum
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, directly matching the 'AI agent development' requirement
Strong engineering culture: TDD, trunk-based development, code reviews, open-source contributions, and community teaching demonstrate high craftsmanship standards
concerns: No mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume — a primary stack technology listed as required
Kotlin absent from skills; Java appears only in embedded/robotics contexts (DLang + Java for robotic arms), not backend services
No explicit Vitest or Playwright experience mentioned; testing background is strong but demonstrated through a custom D-language runner and general TDD practice, not the required frameworks
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot full-stack engineer whose TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes coverage aligns well with the core stack, and his current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling is a direct hit on one of the more differentiating requirements. The primary gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned at all) and Kotlin (absent from a career spanning many languages, which is mildly surprising), plus no explicit Vitest/Playwright usage. These are learnable for a developer of his seniority, and the overall engineering quality signals — TDD discipline, open-source maintainership, community teaching — suggest he would ramp quickly. A mid-interview technical screen on Nest.js patterns and JVM-adjacent work would resolve the remaining risk.
